title: Greifenseelauf — Race Facts
summary: Greifenseelauf — Race Facts Full name: Greifenseelauf, Uster (also: Halbmarathon Greifensee) Organiser: Markus Ryffel's AG, Worb Website: greifenseelauf.ch | Registration: trackmaxx.ch (code GSL26) Schedule: Always third Saturday of September. ## Distances | Event | Distance | |---|---| | Half Marathon | 21.1 km | | 10 km | 10 km | | Short run | 6.3 km | | Kids races | U8–U14 (Minigreifenseelauf + FAMIGROS RUN & WIN) | ## Course - Loops the Greifensee nature reserve near Uster, Canton Zurich. - Surface: ~60% asphalt, ~40% natural roads / gravel.
